div.h2: Memory Layout (Little Endian) 0x00 | currentTerm | 8 bytes 0x08 | votedFor | 8 bytes 0x10 | log_length | 4 bytes 0x14 | log_data[] | Var bytes

tr.td: Node reboots with old state. RPC never replied. Safety preserved.
Atomic rename ensures file is valid or old. No partial writes.
State already on disk. Node reboots in correct state.

div.p: CRITICAL BARRIER Execution MUST block here until bits hit the platter.

ul.li: Failure to persist must result in zero-effect (no response).
fsync is required to survive power loss, not just OS crashes.
